name: TikeDev
html:
<opentowork>
TikeDev
available & building
_
css: .tike-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 120px; background: #0d0d0d; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; } .tike-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 28px, rgba(0,255,140,0.03) 28px, rgba(0,255,140,0.03) 29px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 28px, rgba(0,255,140,0.03) 28px, rgba(0,255,140,0.03) 29px); animation: tike-scroll 6s linear infinite; } @keyframes tike-scroll { from { background-position: 0 0; } to { background-position: 0 58px; } } .tike-badge { display: flex; gap: clamp(4px, 1.5vw, 10px); margin-bottom: clamp(6px, 2vh, 14px); } .tike-tag { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2vw, 0.85rem); font-weight: bold; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; animation: tike-tagpop 1.8s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .open-tag { background: #00ff8c; color: #0d0d0d; animation-delay: 0s; } .to-tag { background: #00c8ff; color: #0d0d0d; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .work-tag { background: #b84cff; color: #fff; animation-delay: 0.6s; } @keyframes tike-tagpop { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 0.85; } 100% { transform: translateY(-4px); opacity: 1; } } .tike-name { font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 5vw, 2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00ff8c, 0 0 22px #00ff8c88; animation: tike-glow 2.4s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes tike-glow { 0% { text-shadow: 0 0 6px #00ff8c, 0 0 18px #00ff8c66; } 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 12px #00ff8c, 0 0 36px #00ff8caa, 0 0 60px #00ff8c44; } } .tike-sub { margin-top: clamp(4px, 1vh, 8px); font-size: clamp(0.45rem, 1.6vw, 0.7rem); letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00c8ff; opacity: 0.8; } .tike-cursor { font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 3vw, 1.4rem); color: #00ff8c; margin-top: clamp(4px, 1vh, 10px); animation: tike-blink 1s step-end infinite; } @keyframes tike-blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0; } }
